summary: Excellent soundboard recording captures a smoking show highlighted by Peggy‑O, Alabama Getaway and an incendiary Black Peter solo.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear soundboard source, calling the audio “excellent” and noting Brent’s keyboards dominate every track. Musically the concert is described as “smoking,” with standout moments including a blistering Jerry Garcia solo on Black Peter, seamless space into Not Fade Away, and powerful renditions of Peggy‑O, Alabama Getaway, China>Rider and Let It Grow.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the performance (exceptional solos, tight set flow) and the superb soundboard quality, indicating an outstanding overall experience.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the recording as crisp and excellent; no issues noted.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows smoothly with seamless transitions (e.g., space into Not Fade Away) and a high‑energy second half packed with highlights.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His Black Peter solo is called the best ever heard, aggressive, volcanic and emotionally charged.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland “kicks out the keys on all songs,” receiving strong praise.
